metadata.matchName: Gets On Base vs Matt's Alt Accounts

profile.name: Chaffles
profile.bio: My name is Eric and I'm officially a too-old league player who started back in season 1. I primarily play top & when I am not 5 banned enjoy aggressive duelists or heavy teamfight impact champs. Any deaths I have in the LCC are either limit testing or "good deaths" for the macro.

profile.name: FF Clone
profile.bio: Emerald mid laner, flexable player, your lovely community manager :)

profile.name: DuckJugs
profile.bio: lebron is my sunshine, my oh so glorius king, CAVS ON TOP BABY!!!!

profile.name: Empro
profile.bio: Just a goofy guy that's been on 2 collegiate teams and 7 amateur teams

profile.name: BCB RSexy
profile.bio: Role-swapper, leaving first team ADC behind for greener jungles. Season 3 MVP and Runner-up, ready to run it down and fight to the death for a scuttle crab.
